zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Burley於1371年出生在英國賀福爾維爾頓。她和Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft至少有2個兒子和7個女兒。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Burley于1371年出生在英国賀福爾維爾頓。她和Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft至少有2个儿子和7个女儿。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Burley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Burley, for example in Hampshire, Rutland, Shropshire, and Yorkshire, from Old English burh ‘fortified manor, stronghold’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of Swiss German Bürli: from a diminutive of būr ‘peasant, farmer’ (see Bauer ).

variants.name: Berley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Burley  . This surname is now rare in Britain. It may also be a variant of   Birley  .
Americanized form of Swiss German Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of their South German cognate Behrle or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Barley .

variants.name: Birley
meanings: English: habitational name from Birley in Ecclesfield (Yorkshire), East or North Bierley (Yorkshire), or Birley (Derbyshire).

variants.name: Burlew
meanings: Probably a variant of   Burley   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Burley was born in 1371, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England. She had at least 2 sons and 7 daughters with Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Burley est née en 1371, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles avec Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Burley wurde 1371 in Wilton, Herefordshire, England geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Burley è nata il nel 1371 nel Wilton, Herefordshire, England. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie con Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Burleyは1371年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた。彼女はSir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroftとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Burley(은)는 1371년 영국 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Burley nasceu em 1371, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas com Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Burley родилась в 1371 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей от Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Burley nació en 1371, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas con Sir John I Burley Knight of Leigh Sheriff of Shropshire Chief Justice of South Wales Earl of Bromcroft. Murió en su pueblo.
